options.text: To reduce the cost of the renovation
To ensure the renovation meets historical preservation requirements
To obtain funding for the project
To find tenants for the building

questions.stem:
Dear Ms. Alvarez,

Re: Lease Renewal for Suite 510, Commerce Tower

I am writing regarding the renewal of your commercial lease, which is set to expire on June 30. Based on current market conditions and recent improvements made to the building, we are proposing the following terms for a new three-year lease:

- Monthly rent: $4,200 (an increase of 8% from the current rate of $3,889)
- Annual rent escalation: 3% per year
- Tenant improvement allowance: $15,000 for approved modifications
- Common area maintenance (CAM) fees: $850/month (previously $780)
- Lease term: 36 months, beginning July 1

Please note that tenants who sign by April 15 will receive a one-month rent concession applied to the first month of the new lease. We are open to negotiation on the terms and welcome the opportunity to discuss.

Sincerely,
Property Management Office

If Ms. Alvarez signs the new lease by April 15, how much will she pay in total for the first month (rent plus CAM fees)?
questions.explanation: 如果在4月15日前签约，第一个月租金减免（为0），但仍需支付CAM费用850美元。因此第一个月总计850美元。

questions.stem:
To: Editorial Staff
From: Managing Editor
Date: November 3

As you are aware, our subscriber numbers have been declining steadily over the past 18 months. Our latest reader survey reveals that while our long-form investigative pieces continue to receive high marks for quality, readers increasingly find our publication format inconvenient and our digital presence lacking compared to competitors. Additionally, younger demographics report discovering content primarily through social media, a channel where our presence is minimal.

I am convening a strategy meeting on November 10 to discuss a comprehensive digital transformation plan. This is not about abandoning our editorial standards but rather finding new ways to deliver quality content to audiences where they are. Please come prepared with ideas.

What does the Managing Editor suggest is the main reason for the subscriber decline?
questions.explanation: 总编暗示订阅量下降的主要原因不是内容质量（调查显示质量获高分），而是分发方式和数字化存在不足。

options.text: The quality of articles has decreased.
The publication's delivery format and digital presence are not meeting reader preferences.
Subscription prices are too high.
There are too many competing publications.

questions.stem:
Insurance Claim Procedures

Filing a Claim:
1. Report the incident within 48 hours by calling 1-800-555-0234 or filing online.
2. Provide your policy number, date of incident, and a detailed description.
3. Submit supporting documentation (photos, police reports, repair estimates) within 14 days.

Claim Processing:
- Claims under $5,000: Processed within 10 business days of receiving all documentation.
- Claims $5,000-$25,000: Require an adjuster visit, processed within 21 business days.
- Claims over $25,000: Require adjuster visit and independent appraisal, processed within 45 business days.

Deductibles:
- Standard policy: $500 deductible per claim
- Premium policy: $250 deductible per claim
- Comprehensive policy: $0 deductible

Note: Claims filed more than 48 hours after the incident may be subject to additional review and could result in reduced coverage.

A Premium policyholder files a $12,000 claim with all documentation submitted promptly. What is the maximum amount the policyholder can expect to receive, and how long should processing take?
questions.explanation: Premium保单免赔额为250美元，因此最高可获赔11,750美元。12,000美元的索赔在5,000-25,000范围内，需21个工作日处理。

options.text: $11,500 within 10 business days
$11,750 within 21 business days
$12,000 within 21 business days
$11,750 within 45 business days

questions.stem:
Dear Dr. Watanabe,

I am writing to share some concerns raised by the quality assurance team regarding our latest batch of pharmaceutical products (Batch #PH-2847). While the products meet all mandatory regulatory standards, the QA team noted that several measurements fell within the lower acceptable range of our internal specifications, which are typically more stringent than regulatory requirements. Specifically, the dissolution rates for three samples were at 85%, just above our internal minimum of 82%, though well above the regulatory minimum of 75%.

I want to emphasize that releasing this batch would be entirely compliant with all regulations. However, given our company's reputation for exceeding industry standards, I wanted to bring this to your attention before we proceed. The production team has identified a possible calibration drift in one of the mixing units that may explain the variance.

Please advise on how you would like to proceed.

Regards,
Quality Assurance Director

What is the QA Director implicitly recommending?
questions.explanation: QA主任虽然说产品合规，但通过强调公司一贯超越行业标准的声誉和已发现的设备问题，暗示应谨慎处理，可能需要在发布前进一步调查。

options.text: Release the batch immediately since it meets all regulations
Destroy the entire batch and start over
Investigate the calibration issue before releasing the batch to maintain the company's quality standards
Lower the company's internal quality standards

questions.stem:
Annual Sustainability Report Excerpt:

Our commitment to environmental stewardship has yielded tangible results this year. Through a combination of process optimization and investment in clean technology, we have reduced our carbon footprint by 22% compared to our baseline year. Water consumption at our manufacturing facilities has decreased by 15%, and we have diverted 87% of our operational waste from landfills through recycling and composting programs. These achievements underscore our belief that environmental responsibility and business performance are not mutually exclusive but rather complementary objectives that reinforce one another.

In this passage, the phrase 'mutually exclusive' is closest in meaning to:
questions.explanation: 'mutually exclusive'意为'互相排斥的，不能同时存在的'，即'incompatible, unable to coexist'。

options.text: Equally important
Incompatible and unable to coexist
Dependent on each other
Difficult to measure

questions.stem:
Vendor Selection Criteria - Request for Proposal (RFP) #2024-087

The City of Westbrook is seeking proposals for the design and installation of a new traffic management system. Proposals will be evaluated based on the following weighted criteria:

- Technical approach and methodology: 35%
- Experience with similar projects: 25%
- Cost proposal: 20%
- Project timeline: 10%
- Local workforce utilization: 5%
- Sustainability features: 5%

Additional Requirements:
- Vendors must have completed at least three projects of similar scope within the last five years.
- The proposed system must be compatible with the city's existing infrastructure.
- A performance bond equal to 10% of the total contract value is required.
- Proposals are due by 4:00 p.m. on January 31. Late submissions will not be considered.
- The city reserves the right to reject any or all proposals.

A vendor submits the lowest cost proposal but has completed only two similar projects in the last five years. What is the most likely outcome?
questions.explanation: RFP明确要求供应商在过去五年内至少完成三个类似项目。仅完成两个项目不满足基本资格要求，即使价格最低也可能被取消资格。

options.text: The vendor will be selected because they offered the lowest price.
The vendor's proposal will likely be disqualified for not meeting the minimum experience requirement.
The vendor will be given extra time to complete a third project.
The experience criterion will be waived due to the low cost.

questions.stem:
Dear Members of the Compensation Committee,

I have prepared the attached analysis of executive compensation trends across our industry peer group. Our findings indicate that while our base salaries are competitive at the 60th percentile, our total compensation packages, when including long-term incentives, fall below the median. This disparity is most pronounced at the vice president level, where our total compensation is approximately 18% below the peer group median.

In the past two years, we have lost four vice presidents to competitors, and exit interviews consistently cite compensation as a contributing factor. Meanwhile, our company has outperformed the industry average in revenue growth by 7% and in profit margins by 4%, suggesting that our leadership team is delivering above-average results for below-median pay.

I recommend we revisit our long-term incentive structure at the next committee meeting.

Respectfully,
Chief Human Resources Officer

What argument is the CHRO building in this memo?
questions.explanation: CHRO通过数据论证公司领导层以低于中位数的薪酬创造了高于平均水平的业绩，暗示薪酬与绩效不匹配，建议调整长期激励以留住人才。

options.text: Base salaries should be reduced to cut costs.
The company should hire less experienced executives at lower pay.
Long-term incentive compensation should be increased to retain high-performing executives.
The company's financial performance does not justify higher compensation.

questions.stem:
Warranty Terms and Conditions - ProBuild Power Tools

ProBuild power tools come with the following warranty coverage:

- Professional Series: 5-year limited warranty covering manufacturing defects; 2-year warranty on batteries and chargers.
- Home Series: 3-year limited warranty covering manufacturing defects; 1-year warranty on batteries and chargers.

Warranty Exclusions:
- Damage resulting from misuse, neglect, or unauthorized modifications
- Normal wear and tear, including brushes, blades, and bits
- Tools used for commercial purposes under a Home Series warranty
- Damage caused by power surges or improper voltage

Claim Process:
Return the defective product to any authorized ProBuild service center with proof of purchase. Warranty repairs will be completed within 15 business days. If repair is not possible, ProBuild will replace the product with the same or comparable model at no charge. Transportation costs to the service center are the responsibility of the customer.

A homeowner purchases a Home Series drill and uses it to renovate rental properties for profit. After 18 months, the motor fails. Is this covered under warranty?
questions.explanation: 虽然电钻在3年保修期内（18个月），但Home Series保修明确排除商业用途。将其用于翻新出租物业属于商业用途，因此不在保修范围内。

options.text: Yes, because the drill is within the 3-year warranty period.
Yes, because motor failure is a manufacturing defect.
No, because using a Home Series tool for commercial purposes voids the warranty.
No, because the warranty only covers the first 12 months.

questions.stem:
Dear Mr. Prescott,

Thank you for your thoughtful letter regarding your experience at our restaurant last Saturday evening. I was troubled to learn that your anniversary dinner did not meet the standards we strive for. You mentioned that the wait for your table exceeded 30 minutes despite having a reservation, that the appetizers arrived after the main course, and that the server seemed inattentive throughout the evening.

I have spoken with the staff members involved, and I want you to know that this experience does not reflect who we are. Our maître d' informed me that an unexpected large party arrived shortly before your reservation time, which created a cascade of delays that affected several tables that evening. We have since revised our booking procedures to prevent this from happening again.

I would like to invite you and your wife to return as our guests for a complimentary dinner so that we may have the opportunity to provide you with the experience you deserve.

With sincere apologies,
Restaurant Owner

What does the restaurant owner's response reveal about the owner's priorities?
questions.explanation: 餐厅老板的回应显示他重视客户关系的长期维护，不仅道歉和解释原因，还改进了预订流程并提供免费晚餐，体现了以客户为中心和持续改进的经营理念。

options.text: The owner is primarily focused on defending the restaurant's staff.
The owner values customer relationships and is willing to take corrective action and make amends.
The owner believes the customer's complaints were exaggerated.
The owner wants to avoid any legal liability.

questions.stem:
Professional Development Reimbursement Policy

Eligible employees may receive tuition reimbursement for approved courses and certifications that are directly related to their current role or an identified career path within the company.

Reimbursement Levels:
- Employees with 1-3 years of service: Up to $3,000 per calendar year
- Employees with 3-5 years of service: Up to $5,000 per calendar year
- Employees with 5+ years of service: Up to $8,000 per calendar year

Conditions:
- Courses must be taken at an accredited institution or through an approved provider.
- Pre-approval from the employee's manager and HR is required before enrollment.
- Employees must achieve a grade of B or higher (or equivalent) to qualify for reimbursement.
- Employees who voluntarily leave the company within 12 months of receiving reimbursement must repay 100% of the amount. Those who leave within 12-24 months must repay 50%.
- Part-time employees receive reimbursement at 50% of the applicable rate.

An employee who has worked at the company for 4 years on a part-time basis earns an A in an approved course that cost $6,000. How much reimbursement will the employee receive?
questions.explanation: 4年工龄的员工最高可报销5,000美元/年，但作为兼职员工只能获得50%，即2,500美元。虽然课程费6,000美元，但报销上限为2,500美元。

questions.stem:
Dear Board of Directors,

I am writing to present the findings of the independent audit conducted on the operations of Clearwater Municipal Water Authority over the past fiscal year. While overall financial management was found to be satisfactory, several areas of concern were identified.

First, overtime expenses increased by 43% compared to the previous year, primarily concentrated in the maintenance department. Our analysis suggests this is linked to aging infrastructure that requires increasingly frequent repairs rather than planned maintenance. Second, the authority's emergency reserve fund currently stands at $1.2 million, which is below the recommended minimum of $2 million for an organization of this size. Third, we noted that 12 of the 45 vendor contracts reviewed had not been competitively bid within the last five years, contrary to the authority's procurement policy.

We recommend that the board prioritize infrastructure investment planning, replenish the emergency fund through a phased approach, and conduct a comprehensive review of all vendor contracts.

Respectfully submitted,
Independent Auditor

Based on the audit findings, what is the most significant long-term risk facing the Water Authority?
questions.explanation: 审计报告显示加班费激增与基础设施老化直接相关，应急储备金不足，这些都指向同一个核心问题：缺乏基础设施投资规划将导致越来越多的紧急维修和财务压力。

options.text: Vendor fraud due to non-competitive contracts
Escalating costs from deteriorating infrastructure that is being repaired rather than replaced
Employee dissatisfaction due to excessive overtime
Insufficient revenue from water service fees

questions.stem:
Dear Colleagues,

As many of you have heard through various channels, there has been speculation about potential organizational changes in the coming months. I want to address this directly rather than allow uncertainty to persist.

Yes, the executive team is evaluating our organizational structure to better align with our strategic goals for the next three years. This process is still in its early stages, and no decisions have been made. What I can tell you is that any changes will be guided by three principles: first, we will prioritize retaining our talented workforce; second, we will ensure that affected employees receive comprehensive support; and third, we will communicate openly throughout the process.

I understand that ambiguity can be stressful, and I appreciate your patience. I will provide a detailed update by the end of next month. In the meantime, please direct any questions to your department heads.

Sincerely,
CEO

What is the CEO's primary communication strategy in this message?
questions.explanation: CEO的主要沟通策略是在无法提供具体细节的情况下，通过直接承认传闻、阐述指导原则和承诺持续沟通来主动管理员工的预期和焦虑。

options.text: Denying that any changes will take place
Providing detailed plans for the restructuring
Acknowledging uncertainty while establishing trust through transparency and clear principles
Distracting employees from the potential changes

questions.stem:
Dear Team,

I would like to share an update on the client satisfaction survey results from Q2. Overall, our scores improved by 6% compared to Q1, with particularly strong gains in response time and technical expertise. ___ I encourage each team lead to review the detailed results and identify specific areas where their teams can continue to improve.

Thank you for your dedication.

Director of Client Services
questions.explanation: 空白处应在总结积极结果后指出仍需改进的方面，起到平衡作用。选项D在肯定成绩的同时指出了薄弱环节。

options.text: The survey software will be upgraded next quarter.
All employees should take the rest of the day off to celebrate.
The office supply room has been reorganized.
However, the communication clarity category showed only a marginal increase, suggesting that we still have room for growth in how we explain complex solutions to clients.

questions.stem:
Volunteer Opportunity

The Riverside Food Bank is looking for volunteers to help sort and distribute food donations during the holiday season. Volunteers are needed on Saturdays from November 18 through December 23, from 9:00 a.m. to 1:00 p.m. No experience is necessary. Volunteers must be at least 16 years old. Groups of 10 or more should contact us in advance to arrange scheduling. To sign up, visit www.riversidefoodbank.org or call 555-0187.

What is the minimum age requirement for volunteers?
questions.explanation: 通知明确说明志愿者必须至少16岁(must be at least 16 years old)。

options.text: 12 years old
14 years old
16 years old
18 years old

questions.stem:
Dear Ms. Turner,

Thank you for your purchase of the Deluxe Standing Desk from ErgoWorks. We hope you are enjoying your new desk. We are writing to let you know that a free accessory kit is now available for your desk model, which includes a cable management tray and a cup holder attachment. To claim your free kit, simply log into your account at www.ergoworks.com and enter the code DESK2024.

Best regards,
ErgoWorks Team

What is the purpose of this email?
questions.explanation: 这封邮件的目的是通知客户可以免费领取配件套装，以提升客户体验和品牌忠诚度。

options.text: To request payment for an outstanding balance
To offer the customer a free accessory kit for their purchase
To recall a defective product
To announce a store closing sale

questions.stem:
Company Shuttle Schedule
Effective March 1, the company shuttle will operate between the Main Campus and the Downtown Office as follows:

Departing Main Campus: 7:30 a.m., 8:30 a.m., 12:00 p.m., 5:00 p.m., 6:00 p.m.
Departing Downtown Office: 8:00 a.m., 9:00 a.m., 12:30 p.m., 5:30 p.m., 6:30 p.m.

The ride takes approximately 25 minutes. The shuttle does not operate on weekends or company holidays. Employees must show their ID badge to board.

If an employee finishes work at 5:15 p.m. at the Main Campus, what is the earliest shuttle they can take?
questions.explanation: 员工5:15下班，错过了5:00的班车，最早可以乘坐6:00从主校区出发的班车。

options.text: The 5:00 p.m. shuttle
The 5:30 p.m. shuttle
The 6:00 p.m. shuttle
The 6:30 p.m. shuttle

questions.stem:
Company Newsletter Excerpt:

We are delighted to announce that our Greenfield branch has been nominated for the Regional Business Excellence Award. This recognition is a testament to the hard work and dedication of the entire Greenfield team. The award ceremony will take place on May 12 at the Civic Center.

In this excerpt, the word 'testament' is closest in meaning to:
questions.explanation: 'testament'在此处意为'证明，证据'，与'proof'含义最接近。

options.text: A legal document
A religious text
Proof or evidence
A celebration

questions.stem:
Dear Tenant,

Please be advised that pest control treatment will be performed in all units of Building C on Tuesday, April 11, between 10:00 a.m. and 3:00 p.m. All residents must remove food items from countertops and ensure pets are kept out of the unit during treatment. Residents do not need to be present but should leave their unit unlocked or provide a key to the management office by April 9.

Building Management

By when must residents provide a key if they will not be home?
questions.explanation: 通知要求不在家的住户在4月9日之前将钥匙交给管理处。

options.text: April 7
April 9
April 10
April 11

questions.stem:
Dear Mr. Kowalski,

We are pleased to inform you that your subscription to Business Weekly has been renewed for another year. Your new subscription period runs from June 1 through May 31 of next year. As a returning subscriber, you will continue to receive the print edition every Monday and have full access to our online articles and archives.

Thank you for your continued readership.

Business Weekly Subscriptions

What can be inferred about Mr. Kowalski?
questions.explanation: 信中称他为'returning subscriber'（续订用户），说明他此前已经订阅过该杂志。

options.text: He is subscribing for the first time.
He has been a subscriber before.
He only reads the online edition.
He works for Business Weekly.

questions.stem:
Conference Room Booking Policy

All conference room reservations must be made through the online booking system at least 24 hours in advance. Rooms may be booked for a maximum of 3 hours per session. If a room is not occupied within 15 minutes of the reservation start time, the booking will be automatically canceled and the room will become available to others. Recurring bookings are limited to 4 weeks and must be renewed. Priority is given to client-facing meetings. Any cancellations should be made at least 2 hours before the reserved time. Employees who fail to cancel unused reservations three or more times in a quarter may lose booking privileges for 30 days.

What happens if no one shows up within 15 minutes of the booking start time?
questions.explanation: 政策规定如果预订开始15分钟内无人使用，预订将被自动取消，房间将重新开放。

options.text: The booking is extended by 15 minutes.
The booking is automatically canceled and the room becomes available.
A fee is charged to the department.
Security is notified to lock the room.

questions.stem:
Dear Employees,

Effective next month, the company will transition from a traditional performance review system to a continuous feedback model. Instead of annual reviews, managers will conduct brief monthly check-ins with each team member. Peer feedback will be collected quarterly through an anonymous online platform. Compensation adjustments will still occur annually but will be informed by the accumulated feedback throughout the year rather than a single review.

The HR team will hold information sessions next week to answer any questions.

HR Director

What problem is the company most likely trying to address with this change?
questions.explanation: 从年度考核改为持续反馈模式，说明公司认为年度考核频率不够，难以及时反映员工表现，新系统旨在提供更频繁、更全面的反馈。

options.text: Employees were receiving too much feedback.
Annual reviews were too infrequent to accurately capture ongoing performance.
Managers did not want to conduct performance reviews.
The company wanted to reduce the number of salary adjustments.

questions.stem:
Shipping Options - QuickShip Logistics

- Standard Shipping (5-7 business days): Free for orders over $50; $5.99 for orders under $50
- Express Shipping (2-3 business days): $12.99 for all orders
- Overnight Shipping (next business day): $24.99 for all orders; not available for P.O. boxes or rural addresses
- International Shipping (10-15 business days): Starting at $19.99; customs fees are the responsibility of the recipient

All orders placed before 2:00 p.m. EST are processed the same business day. Orders placed after 2:00 p.m. or on weekends will be processed the next business day. Tracking information is provided via email within 24 hours of shipment.

A customer in a rural area places a $75 order at 1:00 p.m. EST on a Tuesday and needs it by Thursday. Which shipping option should they choose?
questions.explanation: 客户在农村地区，隔夜送达不适用于农村地址。快递送达需要2-3个工作日（周二下单周四或周五到），是最快的可用选项。由于下午2点前下单，当天处理，快递可能在周四到达。

options.text: Standard Shipping
Express Shipping
Overnight Shipping
International Shipping
